---
title: "Blog"
description: "Posts on statistics, machine learning, and adjacent topics."
comments: false
listing:
  contents: .
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed:
    title: "Soma S Dhavala — Blog"
    description: "Posts on statistics, machine learning, and adjacent topics."
  fields: [date, title, categories, description, reading-time]
---
